title: Raider Rampage
description: A warfare themed modpack made for my and my friends ititially. Planes, cannons, illager fortresses and magic make this modpack a playground for chaotic large-scale combat.
body: Initially a modpack made for me and my friends, this in an experiance built aroung chaotic large-scale combat and adventure, with planes, cannons, multiblock vehicles of war and literal magic courtesy of Iron's Spells and Spellbooks, this is  a mod pack built for fun times with your friends, or solo exploration of a much more turbulent woorls than in typical minecraft.
